data.title: Elon Musk's Grok Overtakes OpenAI's ChatGPT, Google Gemini, And China's DeepSeek As The Leading Productivity App On Apple's App Store
data.description: Elon Musk's AI assistant, Grok, has surpassed ChatGPT, Google Gemini, and DeepSeek to become the top-ranked productivity app on App Store.

data.title: NVIDIA's New AI System Aims To Transform Genetic Research With Unmatched Speed And Precision
data.description: NVIDIA (NASDAQ: NVDA) has introduced Evo 2, an advanced artificial intelligence (AI) system aimed at transforming the field of biological research.

data.title: Carvana's Online Chatbot Sebastian 'Represents The Brain We're Building,' Says CEO As Used Car Retailer Posts 50% Sales Growth In Q4
data.description: Carvana emphasized greater artificial intelligence applications calling its chatbot Sebastian a "brain" that they expect to develop.

data.title: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong Open To Memecoins Even If They Are 'Low Quality:' 'We Believe In Free Market Capitalism'
data.description: Brian Armstrong said the crypto exchange would follow a market-driven strategy for meme coins, allowing users to trade "low quality" tokens.

data.title: 'Pharma Bro' Martin Shkreli Slams Microsoft's Quantum 'Breakthrough,' Predicts IONQ And RGTI Will Plummet As Tech Falls Behind
data.description: Martin Shkreli cast doubt on recent quantum computing advances and stock valuations, particularly targeting IonQ Inc. and Rigetti Computing.
